evidence.label: Eligibility (AACT-derived)
evidence.text: AACT-derived (auto-populated 2026-05-04). Sex: ALL; min age 18 Years; healthy volunteers: f. CRITERIA: "Inclusion Criteria:~* Clinical diagnosis of PsA with symptom onset at least 6 months prior to the Screening Visit and fulfillment of the Classification Criteria for PsA (CASPAR) at the Screening Visit.~* Participant has active disease at Baseline defined as ≥ 5 tender joints (based on 68 joint counts) and ≥ 5 swollen joints (based on 66 joint counts)~* Diagnosis of active plaque psoriasis with at least one psoriatic plaque of ≥ 2 cm diameter or nail changes consistent with psoriasis at Screenin...
